unified_p2_path_picture.title: p2 LoRA degenerate adapter вҖ” V0/V2 vs V_pairrank/CCC path-level orthogonality root cause
unified_p2_path_picture.root_cause_identified: p2 LoRAмқҳ degenerate single-axis collapseк°Җ substrate root cause:
mechanism_explanation: 1. LoRA top-1 eigen 223k = single dominant axisлЎң mass collapse
2. V0 (template projection)мқҖ single dominant axisмҷҖ alignлҗҳл©ҙ top-3 sum к°•н•Ё вҶ’ p2 V0 best
3. V2 PAPOлҸ„ single axis dominanceк°Җ мёЎм •м—җ л°ҳмҳҒ вҶ’ top-1 singular 419 к°•н•Ё
4. V_pairrank (retrieval rank ordering)лҠ” multi-axis distribution н•„мҡ” вҶ’ single axis collapseлҠ” anti-lever вҶ’ p2 worst
5. CCC (multi-template coverage)лҸ„ multi-axis л¶„нҸ¬ н•„мҡ” вҶ’ p2 worst
unified_p2_path_picture.substrate_proof_for_orthogonality: ліё findingмқҖ V0/V2 vs V_pairrank path-level inversion (afccb425 finding F2)мқҳ substrate root cause: **LoRA eigenvalue distribution variance**. V0/V2лҠ” single-axis dominanceм—җ лҸ„мӣҖ, V_pairrank/CCCлҠ” multi-axis distribution н•„мҡ” вҖ” л‘җ axis classк°Җ LoRA adapter лӘЁм–‘м—җ л”°лқј trade-off.
